data.body: mutmut 3.6 wired into /tmp/rebar-dev with committed [tool.mutmut] config (source_paths=src/rebar, only_mutate scoped to signing/gates/next_batch/validate/_processors; fast fail-fast runner over the dev venv). Trial run on signing.py: 491 mutants, 371 killed, 10 survived (all equivalent: utf-8 alias / error-string / temp-prefix mutations), rest CLI arms unmapped by coverage. Scaling to the 5-module core now.
